command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/fix_telegram.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Update telegram section in config.yaml
sed -i 's/^telegram:$/telegram:
  bot_token: "8849049212:AAG4BfaeqinpzPxN-EKmtsMTFZeUc01nua0"
  allowed_users: "8869156588"/' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml 2>/dev/null

# Verify
grep -A5 '^telegram:' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -8
SHEOF
bash /tmp/fix_telegram.sh"
